name: io.github.cybersafe-lab/saqr-mcp
description: Query Saudi cybersecurity frameworks (NCA ECC, SAMA CSF, PDPL, NCA CCC) as MCP tools

environmentVariables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional. If set, enables LLM-generated answers via Claude Haiku. Without it, tools return curated corpus entries.
